pdf_options.footerTemplate: Lectura — AI-Powered Study Assistant
pdf_options.headerTemplate: Bachelor Diploma Thesis

script.content: mermaid.initialize({ startOnLoad: false, theme: 'neutral' }); (async () => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('code.language-mermaid'); for (const el of els) { const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'mermaid'; div.textContent = el.textContent; const pre = el.parentElement; pre.parentElement.replaceChild(div, pre); } await mermaid.run(); })();
